column1: # /Range Input — restricts the pointer to unprotected cells in a
# Seed: A1=10, A2=20, A3=30. Mark A2 unprotected; turn on global
# protection so the unprotected flag matters.
# /RI A1..A3 — pointer should jump to A2 (the only unprotected cell).
# Down stays at A2 (no other unprotected cell in the range).
# Esc exits Input mode; pointer is unconstrained again.
